zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Legh Venables I於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴可洛福 希爾時，他的父親William de Venables II25歲，母親Anna de Legh32歲。他於大約1296年與Isabelle Dutton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1324年3月在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Legh Venables I was born about 1280, in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Venables II, was 25 and his mother, Anna de Legh, was 32. He married Isabelle Dutton about 1296. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in March 1324, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Legh Venables I est né environ 1280, à Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Venables II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anna de Legh, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Dutton environ 1296. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en mars 1324, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Legh Venables I è nato il circa 1280 nel Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Venables II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anna de Legh, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Dutton circa 1296. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel marzo 1324, nel Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Legh Venables Iが約1280年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブックロウ ヒルで生まれた時，父William de Venables IIは25歳，母Anna de Leghは32歳であった。約1296年にIsabelle Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1324年3月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Legh Venables I(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 벅로 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Venables II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna de Legh(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1296년 Isabelle Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1324년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Legh Venables I nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Venables II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anna de Legh, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Dutton aproximadamente 1296. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em março de 1324, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Legh Venables I родился около 1280 г. в местности букклоу хилл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Venables II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna de Legh, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Dutton около 1296 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер марта 1324 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Legh Venables I nació aproximadamente 1280, en Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Venables II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anna de Legh, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Isabelle Dutton aproximadamente 1296. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en marzo de 1324, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
